name: hook contract: hook may emit modified envelope on stdout; non-empty stdout replaces tool_input
command: echo '{"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"x.ts","content":"raw"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/normalize.sh" 2>/dev/null > out.json && grep -E '"content":"normalized"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
